Summary: Deploy 23-status-code tracking system to enable accurate measurement of all sharing requests. Foundation for all optimization.
Rationale: FOUNDATIONAL REQUIREMENT. Cannot optimize what we cannot measure. All other initiatives depend on accurate data. 350K request analysis revealed gaps in current tracking.

Summary: API endpoint for SPs to verify document availability before creating share requests. Prevents futile requests.
Rationale: Data shows 20.6% of requests (72K/week) fail due to missing docs with 0% success rate. Highest ROI quick win. SP-positive - reduces wasted integration effort.

Summary: Implement intelligent retry with exponential backoff and circuit breaker for issuer document retrieval failures.
Rationale: 26.1% of technical failures (3167/week) are issuer retrieval issues. Many are transient and recoverable with retry logic.

Summary: Dedicated investigation and fix sprint for Android platform covering notifications, UX friction, crashes, and performance.
Rationale: Data shows Android at 67.7% vs iOS 77.8% - 10 percentage point gap affecting 43% of users. 15K lost shares/week is material.

Summary: Select and integrate analytics tool (UXCam/Firebase Analytics) to enable data-driven optimization and session replay.
Expected_Impact: Enable continuous user research, validate A/B tests
Rationale: MUST PRECEDE consent screen A/B testing and Android optimization validation. Tool evaluated (UXCam) but never selected. Critical foundation for measuring ALL conversion improvements.

Feature_Name: Smart Pending Request Auto-Redirect & Reminder System
Summary: Two-part system: (1) Auto-redirect users to pending sharing request on app open; (2) Push notification reminders before expiry. Reduces navigation friction and recaptures distracted users.
Rationale: Combined feature replacing simple reminder. Auto-redirect eliminates 2-3 navigation steps. Reminder recaptures 7% of abandoned requests. Data shows 17.8% abandon without action - this addresses root cause (navigation friction + forgetfulness).

Summary: Database schema enhancement to track status transition history (previous_status, timestamps) for journey analysis.
Expected_Impact: Enable user journey analysis, identify stuck points
Rationale: EXTENSION of Status-Based Reporting. Adds status_log table with state machine validation. Critical for understanding WHERE users get stuck in funnel. Must ship after Initiative 0.
Multiple UX issues identified in user research and Miro boards. Low-medium effort bundle with cumulative impact on user satisfaction.

Summary: Structured error taxonomy mapped to status codes for automated troubleshooting and support ticket reduction.
Expected_Impact: Reduce support burden, automated error classification
Rationale: Connects technical errors (issuer timeout, signing failure) to user-facing status codes. Enables automated troubleshooting guides. Depends on Status-Based Reporting.

Summary: Complete Primary/Secondary EID handling with final EN/AR copy approval and edge case handling.
Rationale: Feature completion for Special Emirati Citizenship users. In development, needs GA release. Limited user segment but strategic government priority.

Summary: One-time consent for DV to periodically check and auto-add new/updated documents from issuers. Same as One-Time Consent feature.
Rationale: Addresses root cause of 20.6% dead-on-arrival requests. Proactive beats reactive. Legal dependency is key risk - requires Q1 clearance.

Summary: In-app feedback tool and banner for user research recruitment to enable continuous discovery and UX validation.
Expected_Impact: Enable continuous user research, validate UX changes
Rationale: From Miro boards - planned but never built. Prevents building wrong solutions based on assumptions. Essential for validating UX changes before rollout.

Summary: Dashboard showing SP conversion metrics, quality scorecard, best practices guidance, and quarterly reviews.
Rationale: SP behavior impacts conversion. No current mechanism to surface or incentivize improvement. Top 5 SPs are 69.5% of volume.

Summary: Secure QR verification with masked references, time-limited codes, anti-replay protection for in-person use cases.
Expected_Impact: 50K verifications/month, 10 pilot SPs, new use cases
Rationale: Enables new use cases (hospitals, hotels, HR). 10x SP ecosystem potential. Benchmarked against Singpass, EU Wallet, Apple. Requires multi-stakeholder approval.

Summary: Advanced chatbot for document search, request assistance, language translation, and summarization.
Rationale: From Miro boards - depends on Stage 1 success. High complexity, uncertain value.

Summary: A critical industry standard that enhances user control and privacy by allowing users to share only necessary attributes, rather than sharing the entire document

Ask the agent anything about any of the uploaded documents ,Integrate an intelligence layer to enable natural language querying across the entire vault (e.g., "Show me all active insurance policies") and provide instant summaries of long documents
